# PackagingDesigner.com.au

> Australia's independent directory and resource for finding packaging, branding and FMCG design studios. Free to use, it helps founders, marketers and brand owners shortlist and brief the right packaging designer, and understand what design costs and involves. Editorially independent; maintained by Morice & Co.

## Find a designer
- [Packaging designer directory](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/find-a-packaging-designer.html): Browse and filter 35+ Australian packaging and branding studios by city, sector and size.
- [Get matched](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/get-matched.html): Answer a few questions to get a shortlist of suitable studios.

## By city
- [Packaging designers in Sydney](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/packaging-designers-sydney.html)
- [Packaging designers in Melbourne](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/packaging-designers-melbourne.html)
- [Packaging designers in Brisbane](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/packaging-designers-brisbane.html)
- [Packaging designers in Adelaide](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/packaging-designers-adelaide.html)
- [Packaging designers in Perth](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/packaging-designers-perth.html)

## By category
- [Supplement packaging design](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/supplement-packaging-design.html)
- [Cosmetic & beauty packaging design](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/cosmetic-packaging-design.html)
- [Pet packaging design](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/pet-packaging-design.html)
- [Beverage & drinks packaging design](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/beverage-packaging-design.html)
- [FMCG & grocery packaging design](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/fmcg-packaging-design.html)

## Guides & resources
- [What packaging design costs in Australia](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/packaging-design-cost.html): Real market price ranges by scope, with an estimator.
- [How to choose a packaging designer](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/insights/how-to-choose-a-packaging-designer.html): A framework for shortlisting and choosing the right studio, freelancer or agency.
- [Freelancer, studio or agency?](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/insights/freelancer-vs-studio-vs-agency-packaging-design.html): Which kind of packaging designer suits your budget and stage.
- [How to write a packaging design brief](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/insights/how-to-write-a-packaging-design-brief.html): What a strong brief includes, with a simple structure.
- [Packaging formats & substrates](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/packaging-formats-substrates.html)
- [Australian packaging marks & symbols](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/packaging-marks-symbols.html)
- [Compliance checker](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/compliance-checker.html)
- [Glossary of packaging design terms](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/glossary.html)
- [Insights articles](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/insights.html)

## About
- [Editorial & disclosure policy](https://packagingdesigner.com.au/policy.html): How studios are listed and how the site stays independent.
